toolArgs.prompt:
You are building StreamCaster, a native iOS RTMP streaming app. Bundle ID: `com.port80.app`. The project starts from an empty workspace at `/Users/alex/Code/rtmp-client/iphone/`.

**Your Task (T-001):** Create the complete Xcode project skeleton. Since we don't have `xcodebuild` available on this machine, you will create the project structure manually by generating all required files.

**IMPORTANT CODE STYLE:** Add beginner-friendly comments explaining what each section does. Prefer simple code over complex code.

**Requirements:**

1. Create the full directory structure under `/Users/alex/Code/rtmp-client/iphone/StreamCaster/`:
```
StreamCaster/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ App/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ StreamCasterApp.swift         // @main SwiftUI entry
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AppDelegate.swift             // UIKit lifecycle hooks
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ DependencyContainer.swift     // Empty DI container placeholder
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Views/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Stream/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Settings/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Components/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ViewModels/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Services/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Camera/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Audio/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Thermal/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Overlay/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Data/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Models/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Crash/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Utilities/
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Resources/
    ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Assets.xcassets/
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Contents.json
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AppIcon.appiconset/
    ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Contents.json
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AccentColor.colorset/
    ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Contents.json
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ PrimaryColor.colorset/
    ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Contents.json
    ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ DarkSurface.colorset/
    ‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Contents.json
    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Localizable.strings
```

2. **StreamCasterApp.swift**: `@main` app entry point with `@UIApplicationDelegateAdaptor` for AppDelegate. Empty SwiftUI `WindowGroup` with a Text placeholder.

3. **AppDelegate.swift**: Basic UIApplicationDelegate with `didFinishLaunchingWithOptions`. Include a property to control orientation lock (`var orientationLock: UIInterfaceOrientationMask = .all`). Implement `application(_:supportedInterfaceOrientationsFor:)`.

4. **DependencyContainer.swift**: Empty class with a `static let shared` singleton. Just placeholder comments showing what will be wired later.

5. **Info.plist**: Include:
   - `NSCameraUsageDescription`: "StreamCaster needs camera access to capture and stream live video."
   - `NSMicrophoneUsageDescription`: "StreamCaster needs microphone access to capture and stream live audio."
   - `NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription`: "StreamCaster needs Photos access to save local recordings."
   - `NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription`: "StreamCaster uses local network to connect to RTMP streaming servers."
   - `UIBackgroundModes`: ["audio"]
   - Bundle display name: StreamCaster
   - Bundle identifier: com.port80.app
   - Minimum deployment target: 15.0

6. **StreamCaster.entitlements**: Include `com.apple.developer.avfoundation.multitasking-camera-access` set to true.

7. **Assets.xcassets**: 
   - Brand colors: Primary #E53935 (red), Accent #1E88E5 (blue), DarkSurface #121212.
   - Empty AppIcon placeholder.

8. **Localizable.strings**: Empty file with a header comment.

9. Create a `Package.swift` file at `/Users/alex/Code/rtmp-client/iphone/StreamCaster/` level that declares SPM dependencies:
   - HaishinKit.swift from "https://github.com/shogo4405/HaishinKit.swift.git" version 2.0.0
   - KSCrash from "https://github.com/kstenerud/KSCrash.git" version 2.0.0

**DO NOT** try to run xcodebuild or create an .xcodeproj. Just create the source files and Package.swift.

After completing, update the SQL todo:
```sql
UPDATE todos SET status = 'done' WHERE id = 'T-001';
```

Then commit the changes with:
```bash
cd /Users/alex/Code/rtmp-client/iphone
git add -A
git commit -m "feat: scaffold StreamCaster iOS project structure

- Create directory structure following MVVM architecture
- Add StreamCasterApp.swift (@main entry point) with UIApplicationDelegateAdaptor
- Add AppDelegate.swift with orientation lock support
- Add empty DependencyContainer.swift singleton
- Add Info.plist with privacy descriptions and UIBackgroundModes:audio
- Add StreamCaster.entitlements with multitasking camera access
- Add Assets.xcassets with brand colors (Primary, Accent, DarkSurface)
- Add Package.swift with HaishinKit and KSCrash SPM dependencies
- Add Localizable.strings placeholder

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>"
```
